text.title: Hybrid Delivery Worked Example
text.summary: One worked example showing Hybrid Delivery applied end-to-end on a representative engagement.

example.title: Reference engagement
example.code: Program: acme-hardware-launch Workstreams: - ws-1 hardware (predictive, monthly milestones, FDA submission gate) - ws-2 firmware (agile, 2-week sprints, iterates with prototypes) Handoffs: - HW board rev -> FW prototype within 5 days; escalation U_PROGRAM_DIRECTOR. - FW signed-off build -> HW certification cycle within 3 days. Governance: single steering committee monthly; sprint reviews fold reports up. Dashboard: - common metrics: cost variance, schedule variance, open risks. - translation: agile velocity × avg-story-cost -> $/sprint equivalent.
example.note: Illustrates every rule from content/01-core-rules.xml on a realistic case.
